reviews.comment:
Muy bien atendido

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5MGFleDZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un servicio rápido y correcto incluyendo lavado. Lo único negativo es el acabado después del lavado. Se hace sin entusiasmo y sin cuidado en los detalles. Necesitan entrenamiento y continua supervisión.

(Translated by Google)
The service was quick and efficient, including the washing. The only downside was the finish after the wash. It was done half-heartedly and without attention to detail. They need training and ongoing supervision.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5bk5ENGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pongan más playeros los días previos al aumento , los pibes no dan a vasto . Estoy hace 20m haciendo fila para cargar y veo el pibe de mi surtidor hace un millón de cosas , no para un minuto. CUIDEN A SUS EMPLEADOS!!.

(Translated by Google)
Put more attendants on the pumps in the days leading up to the price increase; the kids can't keep up. I've been in line for 20 minutes to fill up, and I see the guy at my pump doing a million things; he doesn't stop for a minute. TAKE CARE OF YOUR EMPLOYEES!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5cU5Yem13RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Wait 25 minutes, that's a long time.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, los precios en los repuestos aún siendo socio del ACA bastante elevados.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the prices for spare parts are quite high even for ACA members.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, rápida, eficiente. Funciona todo.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, fast, efficient. Everything works.

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas instalaciones. Muy buena atención. Es un lugar neurálgico así que siempre hay mucha gente para cargar nafta pero atienden rápido.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent facilities. Excellent service. It's a busy location, so there are always a lot of people waiting to fill up, but they serve you quickly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkNzlyM2RnEAE

reviews.comment:
Increíble que tenga que esperar tanto para cargar combustible.los empleados en la suya Se puede mejor pero no le interesa el tiempo de los demás que esperen!!

(Translated by Google)
It's incredible that you have to wait so long to fill up with fuel. The employees in yours can do better, but they don't care about other people's time waiting!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkdV9MQmtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, estacion muy completa, lugar comodo para comer, cargador rapido de autos electricos,baños limpios,etc.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very complete station, comfortable place to eat, fast electric car charger, clean restrooms, etc.

reviews.comment:
Lo único que decir, que los problemas de conexión que tienen, es bastante difícil de aceptar a veces. Servicentro cierra temprano.

(Translated by Google)
The only thing to say is that the connection problems they have are quite difficult to accept at times. The service center closes early.

A lovely, comfortable place to take a break along the way.
